before.title: Split retrieval orchestration into explicit governed modules
before.description: Refactor retrieval into legible stages for query intent, candidate gathering, graph expansion, arbitration, and bundle assembly so governance and evidence handling are traceable instead of buried in one module.
acceptance: Retrieval orchestration stages are separated into explicit modules.
Each retrieval stage exposes its contribution to the final grounded bundle.
Governance can inspect where recall was strengthened, downgraded, or blocked.
